name: 50ct Twist-Flame LED Tealight Candles (White) - Room Essentials™: Battery-Operated, Plastic Housing, Includes CR2032
description:
Add a whimsical touch to your home decor with this 50-Pack Twist-Flame LED Tealight Candles from Room Essentials™. These flameless candles are sure to add elegance to any room. Place them on a tabletop or patio table to create a lovely vibe. Designed in a white color, these battery-operated tealight candles will blend in with the rest of your home decor. With a realistic flicker, these LED tealights give a true candlelight experience with none of the mess or worry.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value
